MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Defendant Mercy Housing California Xvii, A California Limited Partnerships Second Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ann Marie Ballowes Compliance And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eunice Chang, Esq. 415-660-3342 for Plaintiff.
Vivian Huynh, Esq. Christina Forst, Esq. 415-278-1400 Saber Law Group for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Ms. Huynh submits on the TR
Ms. Chang contests and presents arguments; clarify 7 year authorization, injuries due to conditions of property, request reduction of sacntions.
Court comments and poses questions.
Ms. Huynh responds; need to confirm habitability caused injuries and damages, checked tenancy, sanctions appropriate, move on and continue with discovery.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Mercy Housing California XVII's Second Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ann Marie Ballowes Compliance And Request For Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
